quote: I haven't had this much fun with work in a long time. The ability to think of an idea and create a solution without convincing an engineer or product manager and doing it in a day instead of weeks is amazing. Even at a prior company where a good idea would get created in 3-6 months because we had 600 engineers... this is better!

title: SVP Programmatic Operations, TelevisaUnivision

quote: We had team members spending hours each week pulling invoices from multiple shipping portals.
